name: Pumpkin Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare baking sheet with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine and egg whites. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Arrange teaspoonfuls on cookie sheets, 1 inch apart. Bake for 15 minutes or until firm to the touch.
